meta.description: Labeled evaluation cases for CRE Intelligence Platform agents. Each case has a known ground-truth answer derived from public data sources (Census, FRED, yfinance, BLS).

cases.description: Texas is a top-3 migration destination state

expected.ground_truth: TX composite_score > 90
expected.source: US Census Bureau Population Estimates 2023 — TX population growth +1.6-2.1% YoY

cases.description: Florida is a top-3 migration destination state

expected.ground_truth: FL composite_score > 85
expected.source: US Census Bureau — FL consistent top-3 inbound state

cases.description: California shows net outbound migration (low score)

expected.ground_truth: CA biz_score = 18 (net corporate outflows)
expected.source: US Census Bureau — CA net domestic outmigration since 2020

cases.description: Migration data returns all 50 states + DC

expected.ground_truth: 51 states/territories

cases.description: Composite score formula: 60% pop growth + 40% biz score

expected.ground_truth: Score follows documented formula

cases.description: Industrial cap rate benchmark is 5.6%

expected.ground_truth: 5.6% per platform benchmark table

cases.description: Office has highest cap rate among all property types

expected.ground_truth: Office 8.5% is highest; Data Center 4.8% is lowest

cases.description: REIT universe contains expected tickers

expected.condition: contains PLD, EQR, SPG, BXP, WELL, PSA, EQIX
expected.ground_truth: 7 anchor REITs present across all property types

cases.description: REIT prices are positive and within reasonable range

expected.ground_truth: No REIT trades above $2000 or at $0 (EQIX trades ~$1050)

cases.description: Fed Funds Rate is within plausible range

expected.ground_truth: Fed Funds has been 0-5.5% in modern era

cases.description: 10Y Treasury is populated and plausible

expected.ground_truth: 10Y has ranged 0.5-5.0% since 2020

cases.description: Yield curve data has all 5 maturities

expected.ground_truth: 5 maturities required for curve shape analysis

cases.description: Cap rate adjustments cover all 7 property types

expected.ground_truth: Industrial, Multifamily, Retail, Office, Healthcare, Self-Storage, Data Centers

cases.description: Construction cost signal is one of HIGH/MODERATE/LOW

expected.ground_truth: Signal must be one of three valid values

cases.description: All 5 commodities are tracked with valid SMA data

expected.condition: contains USO, UNG, XLE, CPER, SLX and all have sma_60 > 0
expected.ground_truth: 5 commodity ETFs with 60-day moving averages

cases.description: Signal HIGH when avg momentum > +5%

expected.ground_truth: Threshold: >+5% = HIGH

cases.description: Tenant demand signal score is 0-100

expected.ground_truth: Composite score bounded 0-100

cases.description: Demand signal label matches score thresholds

expected.condition: STRONG if score >= 65, MODERATE if 40-64, SOFT if < 40
expected.ground_truth: Label must be consistent with score

cases.description: Inflation signal is one of HOT/MODERATE/COOLING

expected.ground_truth: Signal must be one of three valid values

cases.description: Credit conditions signal is one of LOOSE/NEUTRAL/TIGHT

expected.ground_truth: Signal must be one of three valid values
